ariaSpec.usage: Announces the switch role of the element.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The input requires an accessible name to which it will be assigned.
Rendered only when the Switch is in a form. Required because <span role="switch"> does not support the native required attribute.
Announces the checked state of the Switch.
Points to the hint or error message for the switch.
Rendered only when the Switch is in a form and announces the invalid state.
The element must be focusable. Disabled switches are removed from tab order.
Rendered only when the Switch is disabled.
Rendered only when the Switch is readonly. Readonly switches remain focusable but their value cannot be changed.

kbSpec.behavior: Toggles the checked state of the Switch. Works analogically to the checkbox.
